content:
Episode 70 of PwC Belgium's 
hashtag
#InternationalTax Update. Thank you for sharing Dr. Jean-Philippe Van West. This and all previous episodes are at https://lnkd.in/dh-ZjqHv and https://lnkd.in/d3tueXhk
comment: International tax developments increasingly require aligning policy interpretation with operational data and systems; the real challenge is often execution across jurisdictions, not just understanding the rules.
